variant: 110,000 and 120,000 lb capacity four-post runway lifts

specifications.column_material: 1 inch x 7 inch forklift mast sections
specifications.lifting_cylinders: Inverted heavy duty cylinders in each column
specifications.drive_system: Direct drive - no chains or cables

features: 110,000 or 120,000 lb capacity - heaviest Mohawk four-post lifts
1 inch x 7 inch forklift mast column sections
Inverted heavy duty lifting cylinders in each column
Direct drive - no chains or cables
Computer controlled PLC synchronization for all 4 cylinders
Control box positioned per customer preference
Built-in front and rear wheel stops
All-position safety locks in all four posts
Custom configurations available (longer, taller, wider, heavier)

optional_equipment.description: For removing rear ends, differentials, or heavy transmissions
Longer, taller, shorter, wider, or heavier capacity available

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: Multi-position mechanical locks in all four posts
Built-in wheel stops and automatic flip-up chocks
notes: Custom configurations available - contact Mohawk directly
